languages.text: "И правда. Мои лучшие разведчики не возвращаются из стана врага, а вы абсолютно невредимы. И даже если вам удалось совершить чудо, вряд ли вы стали бы тратить остатки везения на то, чтобы нести несусветный вздор в лицо сенешалю." {n}Лария кривится, словно собственные слова пришлись ей не по вкусу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "И правда. Мои лучшие разведчики не возвращаются из стана врага, а вы абсолютно невредимы. И даже если вам удалось совершить чудо, вряд ли вы стали бы тратить остатки везения на то, чтобы нести несусветный вздор в лицо сенешалю." {n}Лария кривится, словно собственные слова пришлись ей не по вкусу.{/n}

languages.text: "Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}
languages.original_text: "И правда. Мои лучшие разведчики не возвращаются из стана врага, а вы абсолютно невредимы. И даже если вам удалось совершить чудо, вряд ли вы стали бы тратить остатки везения на то, чтобы нести несусветный вздор в лицо сенешалю." {n}Лария кривится, словно собственные слова пришлись ей не по вкусу.{/n}

And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}

"Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}

"Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}

languages.text: “哦，可不是嘛。我最精锐的侦察队都没能从敌后回来，你却毫发无伤地站在这儿。就算你真走了狗屎运闯进来，也断不会把所剩无几的运气，浪费在跟总领胡说八道上。”{n}菈丽雅皱了皱鼻子，仿佛对自己这番话也颇为不满。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “哦，可不是嘛。我最精锐的侦察队都没能从敌后回来，你却毫发无伤地站在这儿。就算你真走了狗屎运闯进来，也断不会把所剩无几的运气，浪费在跟总领胡说八道上。”{n}菈丽雅皱了皱鼻子，仿佛对自己这番话也颇为不满。{/n}

languages.text: « Là, vous marquez un point. Mes meilleurs éclaireurs sont coincés derrière les lignes ennemies sans espoir de retour, et vous, vous débarquez ici sans la moindre égratignure. Quand bien même un miracle aurait joué en votre faveur, vous ne gaspilleriez pas le peu de chance qu'il vous reste en racontant n'importe quoi à la sénéchale. » {n}Laria esquisse une grimace, comme si elle était contrariée de s'entendre dire une chose pareille.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Là, vous marquez un point. Mes meilleurs éclaireurs sont coincés derrière les lignes ennemies sans espoir de retour, et vous, vous débarquez ici sans la moindre égratignure. Quand bien même un miracle aurait joué en votre faveur, vous ne gaspilleriez pas le peu de chance qu'il vous reste en racontant n'importe quoi à la sénéchale. » {n}Laria esquisse une grimace, comme si elle était contrariée de s'entendre dire une chose pareille.{/n}

languages.text: "Tabii, çok mantıklı. En iyi keşif erlerim bile düşman hatlarının ötesinden dönemezken siz, burnunuz bile kanamamış hâlde önümde duruyorsunuz. Ayrıca oldu ki bir mucize yaşandı, içeri girmeyi başarıp Seneşal ile konuşma fırsatını saçma sapan şeyler söyleyerek heba etmezsiniz." {n}Laria, kendi söylediklerinden hiç memnun değilmiş gibi yüzünü kırıştırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tabii, çok mantıklı. En iyi keşif erlerim bile düşman hatlarının ötesinden dönemezken siz, burnunuz bile kanamamış hâlde önümde duruyorsunuz. Ayrıca oldu ki bir mucize yaşandı, içeri girmeyi başarıp Seneşal ile konuşma fırsatını saçma sapan şeyler söyleyerek heba etmezsiniz." {n}Laria, kendi söylediklerinden hiç memnun değilmiş gibi yüzünü kırıştırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Bueno, mis mejores batidores no han regresado de investigar las filas enemigas y usted está aquí, indemne. Y, aunque hubiera conseguido algún tipo de milagro, no desperdiciaría la poca suerte que le queda contando necedades a la Senescal». {n}Laria arruga la nariz, como si le desagradaran sus propias palabras.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Bueno, mis mejores batidores no han regresado de investigar las filas enemigas y usted está aquí, indemne. Y, aunque hubiera conseguido algún tipo de milagro, no desperdiciaría la poca suerte que le queda contando necedades a la Senescal». {n}Laria arruga la nariz, como si le desagradaran sus propias palabras.{/n}

languages.text: "Tja, ziemlich. Meine besten Späher kehren nicht aus dem Feindgebiet zurück, aber Ihr steht völlig unversehrt vor mir. Und selbst wenn es Euch gelungen wäre, ein Wunder zu vollbringen, würdet Ihr Euer verbliebenes Glück nicht aufs Spiel setzen, indem Ihr der Truchsessin Märchen erzählt." {n}Laria rümpft die Nase, als würden ihr ihre eigenen Worte missfallen.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Tja, ziemlich. Meine besten Späher kehren nicht aus dem Feindgebiet zurück, aber Ihr steht völlig unversehrt vor mir. Und selbst wenn es Euch gelungen wäre, ein Wunder zu vollbringen, würdet Ihr Euer verbliebenes Glück nicht aufs Spiel setzen, indem Ihr der Truchsessin Märchen erzählt." {n}Laria rümpft die Nase, als würden ihr ihre eigenen Worte missfallen.{/n}

languages.text: 「そうだな。私の最良の偵察隊が敵陣から戻ってこないのに、あなたは全く無傷でここに立っている。もし奇跡を起こすことができたとしても、残されたわずかな幸運を無駄に、執事に向かって意味不明なことを言うとは考えられない」{n}ラリアは自分の言葉に不快感を覚え、鼻をひねった。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Well, quite. My best scouts fail to return from behind enemy lines, and yet you stand here completely unharmed. And even if you had managed to pull off some miracle, you would not waste what little luck you had left by talking utter gibberish to the Seneschal." {n}Laria wrinkles her nose, as if displeased by her own words.{/n}
